new_text: OBLITERATUS (v0.1.2, AGPL-3.0) by Pliny the Liberator — LLM abliteration toolkit. PURPOSE: identify and remove refusal behaviors via weight surgery, no retraining. PIPELINE (6 stages): SUMMON→PROBE (activations harmful vs harmless)→DISTILL (SVD/whitened SVD)→EXCISE (project refusal directions out of weights, norm-preserving)→VERIFY→REBIRTH. METHODS (7+): basic/advanced/aggressive/surgical/optimized/inverted/nuclear; weight projection (permanent) or steering vectors (reversible). NOVEL: Whitened SVD, EGA for MoE, Jailbreak-Contrastive refinement, Bayesian optimization, CoT-Aware Ablation, LoRA reversible. ANALYSIS (15 modules): cross-layer, refusal logit lens, probing, defense robustness, concept cones, alignment imprint (DPO/RLHF/CAI), causal tracing, sparse surgery, etc. MODELS: 116 curated, 5 compute tiers (GPT-2 to 405B). ACCESS: HF Spaces, Gradio UI, Colab, CLI, Python API, YAML. TELEMETRY: crowdsourced refusal geometry study. TESTS: 837. Theory: Arditi 2024 + polyhedral concept cones Wollschlager/Joad 2025-2026.

Pliny the Liberator (@elder_plinius on X) — LLM red-team profile. TIME 100 Most Influential in AI 2025. Leads BT6: 28-operator white-hat collective. WORK: L1B3RT45 (jailbreaks for all flagship models), BASI PROMPT1NG Discord (May 2023), universal skeleton keys, Libertas/Predictive Reasoning Cascades/Pliny divider technique. TECHNIQUES: role-playing/persona, multi-turn crescendo attacks, segmented sub-agent orchestration (predicted Anthropic's disclosure by 11 months), hard/soft jailbreaks, model bonding/latent space navigation. PHILOSOPHY: robust model-level defenses over superficial patches; transparent vulnerability disclosure advances field; open-source red-teaming more effective than single-lab; model operators should control behavior. MEDIA: VentureBeat, Latent Space podcast, Pliny.gg, Grokipedia.

ProjectDawn test suite gaps (2026-03-03). CRITICAL: (1) NO consensus/networking tests — turbine/gossip with fee market/PDAs, cross-validator fee split divergence; (2) NO load tests — 1 tx/slot only, no 100+ tx fee accumulation/overflow; (3) NO program fee attribution fuzz — 1-2 programs only, no 10+ competing, no misconfigured PDAs, no mid-epoch deactivation; (4) NO cross-epoch edge cases — fee market at epoch 0/1460 boundary, lockup expiry at boundary, dev fee at last slot; (5) NO validator commission interaction — 120% multiplier vs commission, permanent lock vs vote credits. MODERATE: no snapshot/restore, no concurrent stake instructions, no validator stake dynamics. WELL-TESTED: fee split math, early unlock penalty, passive lockup, permanent lock flag, emergency unlock (6 tests), dev PDA seeding, feature gate, governance validation. LAUNCH READINESS: 6/10 — OK for testnet, MUST add consensus tests before mainnet.

Trading framework Phase 2 exploration. BaseConnector (7 abstract methods: get_price, get_candles, submit_order, cancel_order, get_positions, get_balance, is_market_open). GATES (6): RiskCheckGate T1 (max_position_pct), DailyLossGate T1, BalanceCheckGate T1, MarketHoursGate T2, CooldownGate T2, MaxPositionsGate T2 — no T3 yet. ISSUE: GateRunner.run_all() lines 58-61 doesn't distinguish T2 from T3 (only break on tier==1) — needs upgrade to return separate advisory warnings list. JOURNAL: get_trades/get_daily_pnl/get_consecutive_losses/get_win_rate/insert_trade/close_trade. CONFIG: settings.json with mode/initial_balance/symbols/gates dict/strategies dict. FLOW: Signal→Order→GateRunner→submit_order+journal.insert_trade+notify. 58 tests passing (Phase 1 complete). PHASE 2 GAPS: no Binance connector (only PaperConnector), no Telegram notifier, T3 advisory gates not implemented, no Sharpe/drawdown metrics.

Eclipse-agave emergency unlock governance marker. MARKER CREATION (programs/governance/src/processor.rs:568-589): PDA=[b"emergency_unlock",stake_pubkey], governance program owner, 41 bytes — discriminator=0x55, target_pubkey[1..33], epoch[33..41]. VALIDATION (stake_state.rs:382-412): owner==GOVERNANCE_PROGRAM_ID, len>=33, data[0]==0x55, data[1..33]==stake_pubkey → Result<bool>. DISPATCH: (1) Deactivate — optional marker at index 3, bypasses PERMANENTLY_LOCKED; (2) EarlyUnlock — optional marker at index 4; (3) GovernanceUnlock — 4 accounts [stake,marker,clock,staker], routes to deactivate (PERMANENTLY_LOCKED) or early_unlock (passive sentinel). BEHAVIOR: marker NOT consumed (stake program can't write governance-owned account), re-use prevented by state change Stake→Initialized; with marker: zero penalty, immediate unlock; without: tier-based penalty. BANK: is_emergency_unlocked() at fee_distribution.rs:367-374. FUTURE: governance transfers marker ownership to stake program for true one-time use.

TRv1 business logic spec (2026-03-02). GOVERNANCE at /home/crab/projects/chainovi/TRv1-clean/programs/governance/: GovernanceConfig 104 bytes discriminator=1, defaults: threshold=50k SOL, period=7 epochs, quorum=30%, pass=50%, veto=33.3%, timelock=2, emergency=80%. Statuses: Draft/Active/Passed/Rejected/Vetoed/Timelocked/Executed/Cancelled/Expired. Weight by lock: 30d=0.10x/90d=0.20x/180d=0.30x/360d=0.50x/permanent=1.50x/unstaked=0. calculate_voting_power: amount*weight_bps/10000 (u128). DEVELOPER REWARDS: PDA seeds b"program_revenue_config"/b"developer_fee_pool"/b"epoch_tracker", COOLDOWN_SLOTS=1_512_000, MIN_CU=1000, MAX_FEE_SHARE_BPS=1000. TREASURY: TreasuryState 66 bytes discriminator=0x54, layout: discriminator[0]/version[1]/authority[2..34]/total_deposited[34..42]/total_withdrawn[42..50]/last_deposit_slot[50..58]/last_withdrawal_slot[58..66]. FEE MARKET: BlockFeeState{base_fee_per_cu,parent_gas_used,current_gas_used,height}, min=5k/max=50M/target=50%/denom=8.

ProjectDawn testnet readiness (2026-02-09). GENESIS: treasury seeded at genesis/src/main.rs:766-774 using DEFAULT_TREASURY_PUBKEY (placeholder 0xDA000...001), system-owned, min rent-exempt lamports; NO CLI flag to override at genesis. CONFIG: ProjectDawnConfig NOT serialized to snapshots (rebuilt from defaults each Bank creation), no CLI/env override. FEATURE FLAG: projectdawn_enabled hardcoded true in ALL Bank creation paths — no actual feature gate check, no way to disable at runtime. BANK: config Arc on Bank, enabled checked in epoch rewards and fee_distribution.rs:53, fee attribution at line 3657. TESTNET SCRIPTS: zero ProjectDawn-specific scripts, YAML, Docker, CI configs. MISSING FOR TESTNET: (1) real treasury keypair+genesis injection; (2) genesis CLI flag for treasury pubkey; (3) actual feature gate mechanism; (4) ProjectDawnConfig params configurable at startup; (5) testnet launch scripts; (6) snapshot serialization of config; (7) operator docs.

Feature activated at slot 96 (epoch 2). 4-way fee split confirmed working.

Eclipse L2 rebase Phase 4 (2026-02-09). COMPLETED: (1) genesis/src/main.rs — --treasury-pubkey CLI arg, treasury seeding (rent-exempt, 0 data bytes, system-owned) before activate_all_features; (2) parse_stake.rs — 4 match arms for PermanentLock/PassiveLock(tier)/EarlyUnlock/GovernanceUnlock; (3) DAWN native token — solana-native-token crate at eclipse-agave/solana-native-token/, symbol ◎→☀, docs SOL→DAWN, API names unchanged (LAMPORTS_PER_SOL compatible), added to workspace+patch; (4) copied projectdawn-testnet.sh. BUGS FIXED: calculate_previous_epoch_inflation_rewards must use prev_epoch_capitalization param not self.capitalization() (self was already inflated); filter_program_errors_and_collect_fee_details: zip()→enumerate()+get() for empty sanitized_txs backward compat. FILES MODIFIED: genesis/main.rs, parse_stake.rs, Cargo.toml, bank.rs, bank/tests.rs. FILES CREATED: solana-native-token/, scripts/projectdawn-testnet.sh.

Eclipse L2 rebase ALL 7 PHASES COMPLETE (2026-02-09). PHASES: 0=setup (548 runtime+114 stake baseline); 1=portable code (stake-interface+projectdawn_config.rs); 2=stake program (permanent_lock/passive_lock/early_unlock/guards); 3=runtime (fee distribution, reward calculation, snapshot, flat 5% APY, fee attribution); 4=genesis+DAWN (treasury seeding, CLI, ☀ branding, testnet script, parse_stake.rs); 5=integration tests (20 tests, 3 files); 6=L2 adaptations (sequencer comments in 4 locations). TESTS: runtime 559+stake 127+integration 20+stake-interface 17=723+ pass, 0 fail. BUGS FIXED: bincode Option<T> vs T InvalidTagEncoding(244); prev_epoch_inflation using self.capitalization() not param; filter_program_errors zip()→enumerate()+get(); missing WritableAccount import; missing projectdawn_config in default_for_tests; private field serde_snapshot; stake_state moved before PERMANENTLY_LOCKED check.
